# 求欧拉函数 $ O(\sqrt{N}) $

```cpp
int phi(int x)
{
    int res = x;
    for (int i = 2; i <= x / i; i ++ )
        if (x % i == 0)
        {
            res = res / i * (i - 1);
            while (x % i == 0) x /= i;
        }
    if (x > 1) res = res / x * (x - 1);

    return res;
}
```
